title: fraxinus excelsior f. aurea-pendula
intro: Fraxinus excelsior f. aurea-pendula, also known as the golden weeping ash or weeping golden ash, is a cultivar of the Fraxinus excelsior tree species, characterized by its pendulous branches and golden foliage. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbalism, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior f. aurea-pendula include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to wounds and skin conditions.
